item.title: US Army major in Virginia is charged with plotting to assist separatist fighters in Cameroon
item.description: A U.S. Army major employed as a nurse on a military base near Washington, D.C., has been charged with conspiring to provide financial and tactical sup...

item.title: VCU to create memorial for people, most of African descent, whose remains were dumped
item.description: A Virginia university has approved funding for a memorial for dozens of people, most of African descent, whose bodies were taken from their graves for...

item.title: What to know about the fight over whether New York should lose $74M for not revoking immigrant CDLs
item.description: New York filed a lawsuit Friday to challenge the federal Transportation Department’s decision to withhold nearly $74 million in highway money because ...

item.title: Head-on bus crash near Pentagon stop injures 23, including Defense Department workers
item.description: Two buses have crashed head-on near a Pentagon bus stop, injuring 23 people, including Defense Department personnel

item.title: DOJ to allow firing squads for executions in move to ramp up capital punishment
item.description: The Justice Department will adopt firing squad as a permitted method of execution as the Trump administration moves to ramp up and expedite capital pu...
